textByHash.10397a118066d722fd1d5387ac2adb59c41aca21: No! I don't believe it. I trusted you!
textByHash.2b76cb40525fbf7f77acfbdbf054f2d656bb92d6: Healthorg has become a weak old fool! He's blind to our problems.
textByHash.46547ac8de292be697d5a0184ebf0b8327ee0e79: So it's true! A gnome who loves humans more than his own kind!
textByHash.56b1bf1e89c1fa6eebbf4c49a01c6f180918bae5: They'll almost certainly pick his son, but Argenthorg is just as bad as his father. If he becomes King, he will only appease the humans!
textByHash.8b301a72087a7620556d331869c0ef5cbcf86669: What? But can't he see what will happen if we don't act now! The humans will destroy us!
textByHash.e6a9e805eb03081ac3108e5b2793ceb296d17c60: Finally! How long before we can expect his support?
textByHash.fbe7a19fac6f14bc8ff9145c8c060e9ab4722ced: The truth is out now, Argenthorg. You are not fit to be a king!
